SEARCH
Package fr.uga.im2ag.m1info.physical

Class Envelope

java.lang.Object
fr.uga.im2ag.m1info.physical.Envelope
public final class Envelope extends Object
The packet that travels between physical nodes through RabbitMQ. Envelope is the network-level packet used internally by the physical layer. It carries not only data, but also control information for:
  • electing a root node (ELECTION)
  • building a spanning tree (TREE_DISCOVER / TREE_PARENT_ACK / TREE_REJECT)
  • forwarding application data (DATA)
  • detecting node failures (HEARTBEAT / HEARTBEAT_ACK)
  • rebuilding the tree after a failure (TOPOLOGY_REBUILD)

  • Nested Class Summary

    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    Envelope.Type
    The type of this envelope — determines how it will be processed.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Envelope
    data(int senderId, int dataSourceId, int dataDestId, String payload, int treeVersion)
    Creates a DATA envelope.
    static Envelope
    election(int senderId, int rootCandidateId, int treeVersion)
    Creates an ELECTION envelope.
    int
    getDataDestId()
    Gets the intended destination node ID for this message, which is used for routing data messages through the spanning tree to ensure they reach their intended destination.
    int
    getDataSourceId()
    Gets the original source node ID of this message, which is used for routing data messages through the spanning tree to ensure they reach their intended destination.
    int
    getLevel()
    Gets the BFS level (distance from root) associated with this envelope, which is used during the tree discovery phase to help build the tree structure.
    String
    getMessageId()
    Gets the unique identifier of this message, which is used for duplicate suppression when routing data messages through the spanning tree.
    String
    getPayload()
    Gets the actual content of the message being sent, which is the payload of application-level data messages routed through the spanning tree.
    int
    getRootCandidateId()
    Gets the ID of the best root candidate seen so far, which is used during the election and tree discovery phases to determine the elected root node.
    int
    getSenderId()
    Gets the ID of the node that last forwarded this envelope.
    int
    getTreeVersion()
    Gets the current tree version associated with this envelope, which helps receiving nodes detect and ignore stale messages from previous tree builds.
    Envelope.Type
    getType()
    Gets the type of this envelope, which determines how it should be processed by the receiving node.

    heartbeat(int senderId, int treeVersion)
    Creates a HEARTBEAT envelope.

    Creates a HEARTBEAT_ACK envelope.

  • Method Details

    • election

      public static Envelope election(int senderId, int rootCandidateId, int treeVersion)
      Creates an ELECTION envelope. Broadcast by every node at startup to propose itself as root. The node with the lowest ID eventually wins.
      Parameters:
      senderId - the ID of the node sending this election message
      rootCandidateId - the ID of the best root candidate seen so far (initially the sender itself)
      treeVersion - the current tree version to help detect stale messages
      Returns:
      a new Envelope instance representing the election message

    • treeDiscover

      public static Envelope treeDiscover(int senderId, int rootCandidateId, int treeVersion, int level)
      Creates a TREE_DISCOVER envelope. Sent by the elected root to its neighbors to start building the tree (BFS). Each node that receives this picks the sender as its parent, then forwards TREE_DISCOVER to its own neighbors.
      Parameters:
      senderId - the ID of the node sending this discovery message
      rootCandidateId - the ID of the elected root (for reference)
      treeVersion - the current tree version to help detect stale messages
      level - the BFS level (distance from root) to help build the tree structure
      Returns:
      a new Envelope instance representing the tree discovery message

    • treeParentAck

      public static Envelope treeParentAck(int senderId, int treeVersion)
      Creates a TREE_PARENT_ACK envelope. Sent back when a node accepts the sender as its parent in the spanning tree.
      Parameters:
      senderId - the ID of the node sending this acknowledgment
      treeVersion - the current tree version to help detect stale messages
      Returns:
      a new Envelope instance representing the tree parent acknowledgment

    • treeReject

      public static Envelope treeReject(int senderId, int treeVersion)
      Creates a TREE_REJECT envelope. Sent back when a node already has a parent and rejects a new parent proposal.
      Parameters:
      senderId - the ID of the node sending this rejection
      treeVersion - the current tree version to help detect stale messages
      Returns:
      a new Envelope instance representing the tree parent rejection

    • data

      public static Envelope data(int senderId, int dataSourceId, int dataDestId, String payload, int treeVersion)
      Creates a DATA envelope. Used to carry actual application-level messages through the spanning tree.
      Parameters:
      senderId - the ID of the node sending this data message
      dataSourceId - the original source node ID of this message (for routing)
      dataDestId - the intended destination node ID for this message (for routing)
      payload - the actual content of the message being sent
      treeVersion - the current tree version to help detect stale messages
      Returns:
      a new Envelope instance representing the data message

    • heartbeat

      public static Envelope heartbeat(int senderId, int treeVersion)
      Creates a HEARTBEAT envelope. Sent periodically by each node to its tree neighbors to prove it's alive. If no heartbeat is received within a timeout, the neighbor is declared dead.
      Parameters:
      senderId - the ID of the node sending the heartbeat
      treeVersion - the current tree version to help detect stale messages
      Returns:
      a new Envelope instance representing the heartbeat signal

    • heartbeatAck

      public static Envelope heartbeatAck(int senderId, int treeVersion)
      Creates a HEARTBEAT_ACK envelope. Sent in response to a received HEARTBEAT to confirm "I'm still alive".
      Parameters:
      senderId - the ID of the node sending this acknowledgment
      treeVersion - the current tree version to ensure this ACK is relevant
      Returns:
      a new Envelope instance representing the heartbeat acknowledgment

    • rebuild

      public static Envelope rebuild(int senderId, int newTreeVersion)
      Creates a TOPOLOGY_REBUILD envelope. Triggered when a node detects that one of its tree neighbors has died. Broadcast to all neighbors to initiate a full re-election and tree rebuild.
      Parameters:
      senderId - the ID of the node sending this topology rebuild signal
      newTreeVersion - incremented version number to invalidate all old messages
      Returns:
      a new Envelope instance representing the topology rebuild signal

    • withSender

      public Envelope withSender(int newSenderId)
      Creates a copy of this envelope with a different senderId. Used when a node forwards an envelope — the content stays the same but the sender field is updated to reflect who is forwarding it.
      Parameters:
      newSenderId - the ID of the node that will forward this envelope
      Returns:
      a new Envelope instance with the same content but updated senderId

    • getType

      public Envelope.Type getType()
      Gets the type of this envelope, which determines how it should be processed by the receiving node.
      Returns:
      the type of this envelope, which determines how it should be processed

    • getSenderId

      public int getSenderId()
      Gets the ID of the node that last forwarded this envelope.
      Returns:
      the ID of the node that last forwarded this envelope

    • getTreeVersion

      public int getTreeVersion()
      Gets the current tree version associated with this envelope, which helps receiving nodes detect and ignore stale messages from previous tree builds.
      Returns:
      the current tree version associated with this envelope

    • getRootCandidateId

      public int getRootCandidateId()
      Gets the ID of the best root candidate seen so far, which is used during the election and tree discovery phases to determine the elected root node.
      Returns:
      the ID of the best root candidate seen so far

    • getLevel

      public int getLevel()
      Gets the BFS level (distance from root) associated with this envelope, which is used during the tree discovery phase to help build the tree structure.
      Returns:
      the BFS level (distance from root) associated with this envelope

    • getMessageId

      public String getMessageId()
      Gets the unique identifier of this message, which is used for duplicate suppression when routing data messages through the spanning tree.
      Returns:
      the unique identifier of this message

    • getDataSourceId

      public int getDataSourceId()
      Gets the original source node ID of this message, which is used for routing data messages through the spanning tree to ensure they reach their intended destination.
      Returns:
      the original source node ID of this message

    • getDataDestId

      public int getDataDestId()
      Gets the intended destination node ID for this message, which is used for routing data messages through the spanning tree to ensure they reach their intended destination.
      Returns:
      the intended destination node ID for this message

    • getPayload

      public String getPayload()
      Gets the actual content of the message being sent, which is the payload of application-level data messages routed through the spanning tree.
      Returns:
      the actual content of the message being sent
